Description: 3.7V 2500mAh rechargeable Li-ion cell — powers the HV transformer
Notes: Remove protection board before use; 2000mAh+ recommended

Description: Used as the emitter electrode; exposed wire gives best corona discharge
Notes: Thin gauge works best; thinner = stronger field concentration

Description: Cylindrical housing to channel and focus ion wind output
Notes: Any small diameter tube from hardware/plumbing store works

Description: Shaped into a ring and attached to the cylinder as the conductor surface
Notes: Can be hand-rolled; smooth edges are important for even field distribution

Description: High voltage generator module; steps 3V input up to ~400kV pulse output
Notes: DANGER: 400kV output. Use only with extreme caution. Limit use to under 1 min continuous.
